Operation Epic Fury: How Trump-led US strikes in Tehran killed Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei
description: Operation Epic Fury, a US military action under Donald Trump, achieved its main goal. Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in strikes on Tehran. The operation also targeted Khamenei's daughter and grandchild. The offensive marked a major escalation, aiming to dismantle the Khamenei-led establishment. Explosions were reported across several Iranian cities.

title: All you need to know about ‘Cobra’ actor Vikram's home in Chennai
description: Chiyaan Vikram, the acclaimed Tamil actor, embraces a simple, eco-conscious life at his Chennai home in Mahalingapuram. The residence features a minimalist design and natural materials—teakwood and marble—framed by garden pockets and inner courtyards that cultivate serenity and sustainability. His deep commitment to his craft complements a grounded personal life.

title: ‘In the name of Haidar’: Last Message posted on Khamenei’s X after Trump declares him dead
description: Following Donald Trump's announcement of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death in a US-Israel strike, Iran's Supreme Leader's social media posted a cryptic message invoking Haidar. Iran has not confirmed the death but vowed retaliation, launching missiles and drones at Israel and US bases. Khamenei, ruling since 1989, leaves no confirmed successor, raising concerns about political stability.

Why was Oman spared as Iran targeted Gulf states after US–Israel strikes
description: Missile strikes rocked the Gulf following US-Israeli actions against Iran, hitting Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, the UAE, and Saudi Arabia.  Oman, however, remained untouched. This neutrality, coupled with its crucial role as a diplomatic intermediary between Tehran and Washington, likely protected it from retaliation, preserving a vital, albeit fragile, communication line amidst escalating tensions.

The spirit of "Bura Na Mano Holi Hai" encourages lighthearted fun, making it a joyous occasion for all.

Iran subsequently launched retaliatory strikes targeting Israel and US facilities, impacting several regional nations.

Bored of Peace? Half of Donald Trump's Board of Peace is at war
description: Donald Trump’s grandly titled Board of Peace was supposed to be a Trumpian alternative to the United Nations, promising order, stability, and the end of endless wars. Instead, it resembles a Yes Minister casting call where the least qualified are handed the grandest titles. Nearly half its members are now entangled in active military escalation, from US-Israel strikes on Iran to Pakistan’s growing confrontation with the Taliban. The result is an institution dedicated to peace whose members are too busy exchanging missiles to practise it. Like many international bodies before it, the Board of Peace demonstrates that peace, as ever, remains largely aspirational branding.

title: Iran targets Qatar: Falling missile debris creates panic in Doha – Watch
description: Panic erupted on the outskirts of Qatar's capital, Doha, as rocket debris fell, causing a large explosion. This incident occurred amidst retaliatory strikes by Iran targeting Israel and US facilities, following earlier attacks on Iran. The event highlights the growing risk of regional conflict spillover, with Qatar hosting a key US military base and having condemned the attack.

title: Farhan surpasses Virat Kohli, becomes highest ever to score this record
description: Sahibzada Farhan broke Virat Kohli’s record for most runs in a single T20 World Cup edition during Pakistan’s must-win Super 8 clash against Sri Lanka. Kohli had scored 319 runs in 2014. Farhan’s fluent knock powered Pakistan to 150 without loss alongside Fakhar Zaman, keeping their semifinal hopes alive with a strong start.

India, heavily reliant on Middle Eastern oil, could face significant economic impact if the strait is closed.

description: Several key structures within the compound, long used as Khamenei's primary official residence and a central hub for leadership functions, appear obliterated or severely compromised. title: New SIM-binding rule from March 1: WhatsApp, Telegram users must know these changes
description: Starting March 1, messaging apps like WhatsApp and Telegram must implement SIM-binding, requiring services to function only with the registered SIM in the primary device. This government mandate aims to curb online fraud and enhance traceability by linking active accounts to verified SIMs. Web versions will also face stricter auto-logout rules.

title: China’s great green wall: How 66 billion trees turned a ‘dead’ desert into a carbon sink
Amazon CEO Andy Jassy has a five-word reply for Jack Dorsey firing half of its staff
description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy says he hasn't "really digested" Jack Dorsey's decision to lay off 4,000 employees — nearly half of Block's workforce — citing AI-driven efficiency gains. Jassy acknowledges that many jobs humans have done for decades won't need as many people going forward, but struck an optimistic note, saying new roles will emerge as they have with every past technology shift. He called it a "transition" period.

title: Exiled crown prince hails ‘turning point’ after Ayatollah’s death - top developments
description: A massive cloud of smoke rose over Tehran following a daylight "preventive attack" by the United States and Israel, targeting military sites near Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's offices. Loud blasts were heard as the US confirmed its participation in the strikes, hours after President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with nuclear talks and hinted at a "big decision"

title: Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event: Release timings for all regions
description: Epic Games announced the final two Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour events for February 28 and March 1, 2026. These events offer the most generous loot distribution, featuring four Legendary POIs per match with Rare Chests. Players have a final chance to earn Candy Hearts and themed cosmetic items during these limited-time, one-hour events.

title: Matthew Tkachuk calls Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid best player in the world
description: Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk called Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid the best player in the world after their Olympic gold medal showdown at the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Games. Tkachuk reflected on a pivotal breakaway save by United States goaltender Connor Hellebuyck that preserved Team USA’s lead and shifted momentum in the championship game.
